title: Records Above a Held Breath

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: A tense holding pattern, not a fresh catastrophe: the Gulf ceasefire stayed cold but intact and the Dow cleared 52,000 for the first time, while Pakistan-Afghan border strikes, Russian missiles on Ukraine, Venezuela's quake dead past 1,719, an Ebola emergency, a French skydiving crash and a building US heat dome kept the day weighted down beneath the records.

style.genre: neo-soul / dub-tinged groove — a clean sampled electric guitar tracing a circling topline and a glockenspiel answering high in the gaps, over a steady dub-spaced TR-808 kit with deep tape-echo, a plucked upright bass walking under sampled-piano comp chords and a soft sine sub; F# mixolydian's lowered seventh keeping the brightness honest and unsettled — a market running hot above a held breath, never quite triumphant, never quite sinking

sampleSources: Strudel default library — VCSL guitar, glockenspiel & strings, sampled piano, RolandTR808
pattern: stack( s("bd ~ ~ [~ bd] ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.6).lpf(2600), s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.4).room(0.32).delay(0.25).delaytime(0.375), s("~ rim ~ ~ ~ rim ~ rim").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.3).delay(0.2).delaytime(0.33).pan(0.4), s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(sine.range(0.09,0.24).slow(8)).pan(0.62), note("<[fs3,as3,cs4] [e3,gs3,b3] [b2,ds3,fs3] [cs3,e3,gs3]>").s("piano").attack(0.02).release(1.5).gain(0.3).lpf(sine.range(950,2200).slow(12)).room(0.4), note("fs4 ~ as4 cs5 ~ b4 gs4 ~ ~ e4 gs4 ~ b4 ~ as4 ~").s("gm_electric_guitar_clean").gain(0.42).room(0.3).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.375).off(0.125, x => x.gain(0.16).pan(0.7)), note("~ ~ cs6 ~ ~ fs6 ~ b5 ~ ~ ~ gs6 ~ ~ e6 ~").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.22).room(0.46).rsize(3).pan(0.32).hpf(500), note("fs2 ~ fs2 cs3 ~ b2 ~ as2").s("piano").gain(0.34).lpf(720), note("<fs1 e1 b1 cs2>").s("sine").gain(0.3).lpf(220), note("<fs3 e3 b3 cs4>").s("sawtooth").attack(2).release(3).gain(0.13).lpf(620).room(0.6) )

lines: Fifty-two thousand printed green on the wall,
the strait swung open and the tankers all crawl;
they say there's a meeting, Tehran says there's none —
a ceasefire kept cold in the noon of the sun.
Nobody fired, and the floor didn't break,
so we call it calm for the markets' own sake.
On the Afghan line they're still counting the dead,
and Dnipro woke up to a missile instead;
and a plane out of Nancy that fell like a stone.
But the Court held the ballots that come in late,
and a solar leaf learned to regulate.
Records above a held breath — don't mistake
the quiet for safe, the green for awake;
we run hot on top of a thing that could turn,
two ledgers open, both still left to learn.
Hold the gain and the grief in the very same hand —
an uneasy calm is the most we can stand.
